title: Miss na kita
text: I miss you too, baby. Every second, every minute, I do. But it doesn't linger on me too much. Do you know why? It's because I have plenty enough memories of both of us, either virtually or personally. Everyday with you is a crazy beautiful thing. This is just a small hurdle, we've leaped past lots of them by now. We can do it!

title: Galit ako sayo
text: Hehehe mali mo. Joklang, if I was wrong, I am sorry baby. If mali mo, sorry natin. But going back, I'm dumb and a little mischievious when I get giddy with you. Sorry if I lose my attention when you talk to me, your voice enough is capable of making me sleep. And I'm sorry if I have done something I did not know was wrong, I just feel more free when I'm with you.

title: Mahal kita today
text: Aww sana palagi para di ka galit every millisecond :p. I love you too, babe ko! Whenever you overthink or doubt something, always remember that I really do love you always no matter what. Mwwaaaaahhh~

title: Im sad
text: Hugs! Bawal maging sad brooo tatanda agad hala ka. Whatever is bothering you babe, always tell me. If its me (as its always is, yes kunot noo eunika), tell me. I know I'd respond emotionally too so I'm sorry in advance, but I'll do my best to avoid it. After all, whatever bothers you, I'll be there to strike it down.

title: I'm stressed/Galit ako sa putanginang gagong mundong 'to
text: As I always saaaaay bbgurl, take a break. You're not an invincible barrier, you're still a person that needs rest. If this is about your reqs, well fuck we don't have time to fuck around so push through, but still fuck your reqs, always overloaded and shi. If this is about other people, then fuck them, they ain't enough to fuck your life around baby, you strong asf. Always remember to breaaaaathe, stare outside or the sky. You'll get over this/them. You're the strongest person I know.
